entity.summary: Brazil-based centralized digital-asset exchange founded in 2013, providing real-denominated cryptocurrency markets and related investment services.
entity.notes: Official company history identifies 2013 as the start of Mercado Bitcoin. Current official and independent profiles confirm the continuing Brazil-based exchange service.

expected.summary: Brazil-based centralized exchange launched in 2013 and still operating under the Mercado Bitcoin brand.

changes.summary: Brazil-based centralized digital-asset exchange founded in 2013, providing real-denominated cryptocurrency markets and related investment services.
changes.notes: Official company history identifies 2013 as the start of Mercado Bitcoin. Current official and independent profiles confirm the continuing Brazil-based exchange service.

events.title: Mercado Bitcoin began operating in 2013
events.description: Mercado Bitcoin began operating in Brazil in 2013 as a cryptocurrency trading platform.
events.notes: Year-level launch marker based on official company history.

events.title: Mercado Bitcoin received a US$200 million SoftBank investment
events.description: Mercado Bitcoin's parent group received a US$200 million investment from SoftBank's Latin America Fund, making the business a Brazilian crypto-sector unicorn and funding regional expansion.
events.notes: The financing expanded the Mercado Bitcoin group and did not change the exchange's active status.

evidence.title: Mercado Bitcoin — Quem somos
evidence.notes: Official company history states that Mercado Bitcoin's story began in 2013.

evidence.title: Mercado Bitcoin é seguro? O que diferencia uma exchange?
evidence.notes: Official article identifies 2013 as Mercado Bitcoin's founding year.

evidence.title: Mercado Bitcoin official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Mercado Bitcoin identity and active service.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Mercado Bitcoin
evidence.notes: Independent profile corroborates the Mercado Bitcoin identity, Brazil registration, and 2013 establishment year.

evidence.title: SoftBank Group announces Latin America Fund II and portfolio investments
evidence.notes: SoftBank's official portfolio announcement identifies Mercado Bitcoin as a Latin America Fund investment.

evidence.title: Mercado Bitcoin, Brazil's first crypto exchange, raises $200M from SoftBank
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous reporting provides the investment date, amount, investor, and expansion context.
